changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE stock_move (
id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
company_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
product_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
uom_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
quantity NUMERIC(18,4) NOT NULL,
source_location_id BIGINT,
destination_location_id BIGINT,
move_type VARCHAR(20), -- receipt / delivery / internal / adjustment
move_state VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'draft', -- DRAFT / CONFIRMED / ASSIGNED / DONE
reference VARCHAR(100),
reserved_quantity NUMERIC(16,6) DEFAULT 0,
created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
CONSTRAINT fk_move_product FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product(id) );
CREATE INDEX idx_move_product ON stock_move(product_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_move_company ON stock_move(company_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_move_state ON stock_move(move_state);
CREATE INDEX idx_move_source ON stock_move(source_location_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_move_dest ON stock_move(destination_location_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_move_company_state ON stock_move(company_id, move_state);
CREATE TABLE stock_move_line (
id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
move_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
product_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
source_location_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
destination_location_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
lot_id BIGINT,
reserve_quantity NUMERIC(16,6) NOT NULL,
quantity_done NUMERIC(16,6) NOT NULL CHECK (quantity_done >= 0),
company_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
CONSTRAINT fk_move_line_move FOREIGN KEY (move_id) REFERENCES stock_move(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );
